title: 'Historic $300bn deal': US to get new oil refinery with Reliance backing; Trump calls it 'massive win'
content: India's Reliance Industries is set to invest in America's first new oil refinery in 50 years, planned for Brownsville, Texas.  US President Donald Trump announced the "historic" $300 billion deal, emphasising it will boost domestic energy production, create thousands of jobs, and strengthen national security.

title: ‘That was the turning point’: Gambhir reveals moment that changed India’s T20 WC campaign
content: India head coach Gautam Gambhir identified Sanju Samson's 97 against West Indies as the turning point in their 2026 ICC Men's T20 World Cup victory. Gambhir emphasised Samson's calm under pressure boosted team belief, contributing to their third title win on home soil. He also highlighted the team's fearless, impact-driven approach and adaptability as key to their success.

title: Nvidia CEO to everyone: Here's what changed about AI in 2025 and what it means in 2026
content: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang highlighted 2025 as a turning point for AI, with models becoming reliable and generating significant economic value across industries. He emphasized that AI is essential infrastructure, with its future trajectory dependent on build speed, access, and governance.

title: Kanpur priest dragged out of temple, beaten by mob after photo of him eating 'non-veg' goes viral
content: A temple priest in Kanpur was assaulted by a mob after a photo, allegedly showing him eating non-vegetarian food, went viral on social media. Around 50-60 people attacked the priest at Bhuteshwar Temple, with some even slapping intervening women. Police rescued the priest and are identifying the accused.

title: Watch: US destroys multiple Iranian minelayers in Strait of Hormuz
content: US forces have destroyed multiple Iranian vessels suspected of laying naval mines near the Strait of Hormuz, a critical global oil transit route. President Trump issued a stern warning to Tehran, demanding immediate removal of any deployed mines or facing unprecedented military consequences. This action follows intelligence reports suggesting Iran's intent to disrupt shipping in the vital waterway.

title: Instagram down: Thousands of users facing problems sending messages
content: Instagram is experiencing a widespread global outage, with a significant number of users in the US and India reporting issues.  Reports indicate problems with app access, server connections, and feed loading.  Users are taking to other platforms to voice their frustrations, questioning if the popular app is down. The company has yet to officially confirm the widespread disruption.

title: Bengaluru, Mumbai, Pune and more: Severe LPG crunch hits cities, 1000s of hotels affected
content: India faces a severe crunch in liquefied natural gas and commercial LPG supplies due to West Asian conflict disruptions. The government is reallocating gas, prioritizing domestic use. This has led to reduced industrial supply, impacting restaurants and hotels nationwide, forcing menu changes and even temporary closures as black marketing emerges.

title: UP student dies by suicide after grandfather scolds him for watching T20 WC final
content: A 23-year-old BSc student in Gonda district reportedly died by suicide after his grandfather scolded him for watching a cricket match on his phone and took it away. Family members found him unresponsive on the roof. Counsellors highlight the need for open communication with adolescents to address emotional distress.

title: Uttam Nagar violence: Don’t demolish houses of accused till today’s hearing, Delhi HC tells MCD
content: Delhi High Court has ordered the Municipal Corporation of Delhi (MCD) to halt the demolition of two houses linked to the Uttam Nagar Holi violence until March 11. The houses belong to the mother of an accused and the family of a juvenile questioned by police. The women sought protection, arguing demolitions are being used punitively without due process.

title: Musk responds to report claiming Amazon to hold engineering meeting following outages
content: Amazon is holding a mandatory meeting with engineers to address a "trend of incidents" impacting its e-commerce business. These outages, characterized by a "high blast radius," are reportedly linked to "Gen-AI assisted changes" where best practices and safeguards are not yet established. This comes after a recent website and app outage attributed to a software code deployment.

title: Stuck in India for more than a week, Windies players finally head home
content: Travel disruptions after the T20 World Cup left teams like West Indies stranded in India due to West Asia airspace closures linked to the Israel–Iran conflict. With ICC charter flights delayed, Cricket West Indies arranged commercial flights to send players and staff home. Zimbabwe also faced similar issues and will return to Harare via Addis Ababa.

title: 'Prioritising politics': Harbhajan blasts WC winner over Team India temple visit row
content: Harbhajan Singh has slammed Kirti Azad for politicizing the Indian cricket team's trophy visit to a temple post their T20 World Cup victory. Harbhajan defended the gesture, suggesting Azad, a former cricketer, is prioritizing politics over sportsmanship. He also expressed a desire for a larger reward for the triumphant team.

title: Missing Delhi YouTuber with over 3.5 lakh followers on Instagram found dead in vacant DDA plot
content: A 31-year-old YouTuber, Pushpendra, also known as Akash, was discovered dead on a vacant DDA plot in Delhi's Patparganj industrial area. He had been reported missing by his family since Saturday. While police initially found no signs of foul play, friends and family gathered, claiming inaction.

title: Hardik Pandya and Mahieka Sharma twin in blue as they sail away on a romantic holiday - Watch
content: Hardik Pandya and rumoured girlfriend Mahieka Sharma were spotted celebrating India's T20 World Cup win with a private getaway in Mumbai. The couple, seen hand-in-hand near the Gateway of India, coordinated their blue outfits. This outing fuels engagement rumours, especially after Mahieka was seen with a diamond ring and bonding with Pandya's son, Agastya.

title: Top stocks to buy today: Stock recommendations for March 11, 2026 - check list
content: Stock market recommendations: Syrma SGS Technology, Sagility India, Emcure Pharmaceuticals are the top stocks that are recommended by Mehul Kothari, DVP - Technical Research at Anand Rathi Shares and Stock Brokers.

title: Day 12 of war: US, Israel pound Iran with 'heaviest' strikes; Tehran rules out ceasefire
content: The war between the US, Israel, and Iran intensified on its 12th day with heavy strikes on Iranian targets and regional expansion. Iran vowed to continue fighting, rejecting ceasefire calls, while Israel aims to weaken its leadership. Fighting spread to Lebanon and Iraq, with significant casualties reported.

title: Turkish woman killed in Punjab after being hit by speeding Audi
content: A Turkish woman was killed in Mohali after being struck by a speeding Audi on Zirakpur's VIP Road. The driver fled the scene, and police are reviewing CCTV footage to identify the vehicle and apprehend the accused. In separate incidents, a BTech graduate died after a tractor collision, and a scooter rider was injured in a hit-and-run near Airport Chowk.

title: What are plotted developments and 10 tips for investing in this kind of real estate
content: Plotted developments are gaining traction in India's real estate market, attracting buyers seeking freedom and lower entry costs. However, with increased supply, disciplined evaluation is crucial in 2026. Serious buyers should prioritize clean paperwork, micro-market analysis, and infrastructure quality for successful investments.

title: 'Don't want to see you in fridge': Dentist dies by suicide in Mumbai, ex-boyfriend held for abetment
content: A 24-year-old dentistry graduate's six-page suicide note led to the arrest of her former boyfriend, Fuzail Ahmed Khan, for abetment to suicide. The note detailed alleged insults and humiliation by Khan, stemming from a failed relationship. Police confirmed no communal angle, attributing the tragedy to personal issues.

title: IEA proposes largest oil reserve release of 182 million barrels to ease crude prices
content: Amidst soaring crude oil prices due to the US-Iran conflict and Strait of Hormuz disruptions, the International Energy Agency is proposing a record oil reserve release. This move aims to stabilize global markets, potentially exceeding the 182 million barrels released in 2022. Member nations are expected to decide on the proposal soon, with potential delays if any country objects.

title: Rihanna's mansion shooter charged with 'attempted murder'
content: Ivanna Lisette Ortiz faces 14 charges, including attempted murder, after allegedly firing shots outside Rihanna's Los Angeles home.  She was ordered held on $1.8 million bail and a protective order was issued.  The singer and her family were reportedly inside the residence during the daytime incident, though no injuries were reported.  Ortiz's motive remains under investigation.

title: 'Wish we had 2–3 players like him in Pakistan': Ex-cricketer's blunt take on this Indian cricketer
content: Former Pakistan cricketer Basit Ali has criticised Mohammad Amir's harsh remarks about Indian opener Abhishek Sharma. Ali defended Sharma, highlighting his match-winning performance in the T20 World Cup final against New Zealand after a difficult start. He expressed a desire for players of Sharma's caliber in Pakistan's team.

title: Vijay says 'I don’t have anything other than politics' amid major update in Karur Stampede probe
content: Actor-politician Vijay's emotional declaration of sacrificing everything for politics has ignited public debate. While some fans express concern and others question his narrative, his final film 'Jana Nayagan' faces delays. Meanwhile, Vijay is also navigating a CBI investigation, with his request for a 15-day postponement rejected.

title: Taylor Swift gets disappointing news as Travis Kelce’s Chiefs spark KC buzz
content: Travis Kelce has reportedly committed to the Kansas City Chiefs for the 2026 NFL season with a one year deal reportedly worth up to $15 million. The decision comes after speculation that the 36 year old tight end might retire, especially with his upcoming wedding to Taylor Swift. While Kelce prepares for his 14th season following a disappointing Chiefs campaign, Swift faces a trademark setback involving her album The Life of a Showgirl. Despite the legal pause, her music success continues as she prepares a new single release for Record Store Day.

title: 'Reh jaati hain yaadein': Yuzvendra Chahal's post goes viral - Watch
content: Yuzvendra Chahal shared an emotional post after India’s T20 World Cup 2026 victory, even though he wasn’t part of the squad. Posting a celebration video with Shivam Dube and Kuldeep Yadav, he reflected on memories and friendships in cricket. Meanwhile, BCCI announced a Rs 131 crore reward for the team after India defeated New Zealand to win the title.

title: Dhurandhar: The Revenge trailer - Fans spot Ranveer Singh’s Hamza wearing Rs 25L Rolex
content: The trailer of Dhurandhar: The Revenge has been grabbing attention since its release on March 7, crossing over 59 million views on YouTube. While fans were excited to see Ranveer Singh return as Hamza Ali Mazari, many also noticed a luxury detail in the character’s look — a high-end Rolex watch.

title: 'Wilt, me, then Kobe': Adebayo scores 83 points
content: Bam Adebayo scored the most points since Wilt Chamberlain's iconic 100-point game in 1962 as the Miami Heat star went for 83 points in a blowout win over the Wizards.

title: Sources: Ravens nixed Crosby deal after physical
content: The Ravens have "backed out" of their agreement to acquire five-time Pro Bowl defensive end Maxx Crosby, with sources telling ESPN that medical concerns arose after a physical.

title: Sources: Doncic in custody battle for daughters
content: Lakers star Luka Dončić has separated from his fiancée, Anamaria Goltes, he told ESPN, and is in a custody battle over their two daughters, according to sources.

title: Hofstra, again led by Claxton, returns to tourney
content: Hofstra is returning to the NCAA tournament for the first time in 25 years after defeating Monmouth 75-69 for the Coastal Athletic Association tournament championship Tuesday night.

title: Celtics' Brown ejected after arguing with official
content: Celtics guard Jaylen Brown was ejected in the second quarter of Tuesday's matchup at the Spurs after officials whistled him for back-to-back technical fouls.

title: Sources: Jets get their QB, trade for Geno Smith
content: The Jets are trading for the Raiders' Geno Smith, reuniting the quarterback with the team that drafted him in 2013, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Tuesday.

title: Utah Valley settles WAC dispute over $1M exit fee
content: Utah Valley and the Western Athletic Conference have cleared up their $1 million dispute that threatened to leave the Wolverines out of the league's men's and women's basketball tournaments.

title: Eagles strike, add CB Woolen on one-year deal
content: Free agent cornerback Riq Woolen reached agreement Tuesday on a one-year deal worth up to $15 million with the Eagles, agent Jason Chayut told ESPN.

title: Sources: Pats land Packers' Doubs on 4-year deal
content: The Patriots have agreed to sign former Packers wide receiver Romeo Doubs to a four-year deal worth up to $80 million, sources told ESPN.

title: Sources: TE Knox stays with Bills on new deal
content: The Bills found a way to keep tight end Dawson Knox on the 2026 roster amid a difficult cap situation by signing him to a new three-year contract, sources told ESPN's Jeremy Fowler on Tuesday.

title: Texans bolster O-line, reach deal with OT Smith
content: Free agent offensive tackle Braden Smith reached agreement with the Houston Texans on a two-year, $25 million contract that includes $13.5 million fully guaranteed, his agent told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Source: WR Raymond leaves Lions to join Bears
content: Kalif Raymond has agreed to sign a one-year contract with the Bears, reuniting the wide receiver with Ben Johnson, a source told ESPN's Jeremy Fowler.

title: Source: LB Lloyd gets $45M deal with Panthers
content: Former Jaguars linebacker Devin Lloyd agreed to a three-year, $45 million deal with the Panthers, a source told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Monday.

title: Sources: Tua to sign 1-year deal with Falcons
content: Former Miami Dolphins quarterback Tua Tagovailoa plans to sign a one-year deal with the Atlanta Falcons, a source told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Commanders land Oweh on 4-year, $100M deal
content: Former Chargers defensive end Odafe Oweh, who has 17.5 sacks since 2024, has agreed with the Commanders on a four-year, $100 million deal, his agents told ESPN.

title: Sources: QB Willis, Fins reach 3-year, $67.5M deal
content: Free agent QB Malik Willis, after reviving his career with the Packers, has agreed to a three-year, $67.5 million deal with the Dolphins, sources told ESPN.

title: NWSL ambition rankings: Which teams are raising standards, and which aren't trying enough?
content: The NWSL has teams that are building stadiums, signing stars and spending money. Meanwhile, other teams, well, aren't doing any of that.

content: A lot of red cards were handed out in Cruzeiro's win over Atlético-MG, but it's nowhere near the world record.

content: Jai Opetaia beat Brandon Glanton to keep his No. 1 spot at cruiserweight. Here are the latest ESPN divisional rankings.

title: Supreme Court to pronounce judgment on withdrawal of life support to a 31-year-old man
content: The judgment by a Bench of Justices J.B. Pardiwala and K.V. Viswanathan may decisively draw the boundaries for when to allow natural death to take over

title: Reliance Industries seeking to maximise LPG output, divert natural gas to support priority sectors
content: The Union Govt has invoked the Essential Commodities Act, 1955, to re-prioritise allocation of both natural gas and LPG

title: A check dam on Musi to retain water for Gandhi Sarovar
content: Detailed project plans of the Musi rejuvenation and development are set to be unveiled by Chief Minister Revanth Reddy on March 13

title: VIT-AP University to collaborate with EESL to promote energy efficiency on campus
content: The announcement was made during the ongoing Energy Conservation Week at the VIT-AP campus in Amaravati.

title: The 1952 Assembly election in Tamil Nadu, an illustration of the limits of poll manifestos
content: In the first elections held in 1951-52 after the country became a Republic with the system of a universal adult suffrage in place, the major contestants were the Congress and the Communist Party of India (CPI)

title: What is cheaper to cook with, LPG or induction?
content: A gas flame is more inefficient because it loses nearly 60% of its heat to the surrounding air, but that is not the full picture

title: More women deleted from rolls in most States after SIR
content: Tamil Nadu is the only major State where the gender ratio improved slightly, despite the State recording one of the largest reductions in total electors

title: Sivaji Ganesan’s gift of baby elephant to American children and his U.S. visit as state guest
content: Sivaji Ganesan was invited to the United States as part of the U.S.–India Cultural Exchange Programme. During the trip, Sivaji was treated as a state guest, assigned two officials to assist him, and given a daily allowance of $160, a considerable sum at the time.

title: Kashmir banks on almond and tulip blooms to revive tourism hit after Pahalgam terror attack
content: J&K Chief Minister Omar Abdullah is set to inaugurate a spring festival later this week at Srinagar’s Badamwari, an almond garden that offers mesmerising blooming pink and white flowers

title: Bihar revenue officers’ association expresses objection over Deputy CM Vijay Kumar Sinha’s remarks
content: Deputy CM Vijay Kumar Sinha had said that some office bearers associated with the federation were allegedly acting as “agents of land mafias”; warned Circle Officers to call off strikes

title: D.K. Shivakumar hosts dinner to mark six years as Karnataka Congress chief
content: Congratulating Shivakumar on completing six years at the helm of KPCC, Chief Minister Siddaramaiah said his deputy’s sagacity, ideological commitment and hard work is a model for young leaders

title: West Asia conflict: Jaishankar holds ‘detailed’ conversation with Iranian counterpart Araghchi
content: It is not immediately known whether the sinking of an Iranian warship by the U.S. near Sri Lanka on March 4 figured in the conversation between the two leaders

title: India slams Pakistan’s airstrikes on Afghanistan during Ramzan
content: India's Permanent Representative to the UN, Harish Parvathaneni reiterated New Delhi's support for the UN Secretary-General's call for compliance with international law, including international humanitarian law, and for ensuring protection of civilians

title: Yelagiri Hills witness forest fire, two hectares of forest land destroyed
content: Following the incident, special teams have been formed for regular patrolling of vulnerable spots in the hills to prevent such accidents during summer

title: Women’s reservation in Parliament, State assemblies should be implemented: VIT Chancellor
content: The Chancellor said that inequality among women is not restricted to political representations but also in other areas like education and health care

title: Work to construct ₹65.98 crore ROB near Ambur commences
content: Funded under the Tamil Nadu Deposit Fund 2025-26, the two-lane bridge will be 600 metres long and 7.5 metres wide with at least 50 LED streetlights on the bridge and its service lanes

title: K.K. Venugopal biography an attempt to come to terms with himself: N. Ram
content: Says the former Attorney General talks about himself in the book as to how he was an “accidental lawyer”.

title: Andhra CM Naidu orders steps to minimise impact of West Asia conflict
content: Reviewing other sectors, Mr. Naidu asked officials to focus on providing quality mid day meals and maintaining clean classrooms in schools and colleges across the State

title: Odisha hotel and restaurant association flags LPG cylinder shortage issue
content: The hotel and restaurant industry provides livelihood to thousands of employees and supports numerous allied sectors including food supply chains, transport, and local vendors while this disruption will have wider ramification on livelihood, says the association

title: Terrorist killed as Army foils infiltration bid in J&K’s Nowshera
content: Movement of two terrorists was observed in Jhangar area at around 3 p.m. on Tuesday, says Army; one Pakistan-sponsored terrorist was eliminated, and troops have been reoriented to search for the second terrorist, it adds

title: Experts deliberate on North East security at seminar hosted by Assam Rifles
content: The seminar was held at the Major General Samir Sinha Auditorium at USI and brought together senior military officers, security experts, academics and media representatives to deliberate on the evolving security landscape in the region

title: Gold, Silver Prices Hold Firm Amid Iran War: Check Rates In Your City
content: Gold, Silver Prices Today: In the global market, spot gold was trading around $5,208.08 per ounce, up about 0.3%.

title: US' Claim, Iran's Refusal And A U-Turn: Oil Still Stuck In Strait Of Hormuz
content: US Energy Secretary Chris Wright posted a claim that the United States military escorted an oil tanker travelling through the Strait of Hormuz to ensure global energy supplies, adding to confusion in an already volatile oil market.

title: Blinkit Agent Attacks Customer, Breaks Nose Over Address Mix-Up In Bengaluru
content: A delivery executive of the quick-commerce platform Blinkit has been accused of assaulting a customer following a dispute during a late-night delivery.

title: Stock Market LIVE: Markets Open Flat As Brent Crude Falls Below $90
content: Stock Market Today Live Updates: Sensex rises over 100 points at the open, Nifty back above 24,250; Wipro, TechM post gains.

title: Trump Announces New US Oil Refinery With Investment From Reliance
content: President Donald Trump said the US will get its first new oil refinery in 50 years with the help of investment from India's Reliance Industries Ltd.

title: 'Moderate' Father vs 'Hardline' Son: The Differences Between Ali And Mojtaba Khamenei
content: On the day Iran announced Mojtaba Khamenei as its Supreme Leader, some neighbourhoods in Tehran, crowds loyal to the Islamic Republic gathered under the night sky shouting "Allahu Akbar" -- God is greatest -- celebrating.

title: "Destroy, Deny, Weaken": White House's Latest On Iran War Objectives
content: The White House reiterated its objectives for its operations against Iran, which it said will focus on dismantling Tehran's missile capability, crippling its navy and preventing the country from obtaining a nuclear weapon.

title: On Camera, 18-Year-Old Girl Dies After Truck Hits Scooter In Pune
content: An 18-year-old girl was killed on the spot after a speeding truck hit her scooter in Pune's Pimpri-Chinchwad area. The entire incident was recorded on a nearby CCTV camera.

title: Air India Fares To Rise As It Imposes Fuel Surcharge Amid Iran War
content: Air India will introduce a phased increase in fuel surcharges across its domestic and international network, the airline announced today, citing a sharp rise in jet fuel prices driven by the Iran-US war in the Middle East.

title: Watch: US Says It Destroyed 16 Iranian Mine-Laying Boats Near Hormuz Strait
content: The US said it took out more than a dozen mine-laying Iranian vessels Tuesday, and the Islamic Republic vowed to block the region's oil exports, saying it would not allow "even a single liter" to be shipped to its enemies.

title: India Comes To Bangladesh's Rescue Amid Diesel Shortage Fueled By Iran War
content: Amid improving bilateral relations, India has sent a major consignment of diesel to Bangladesh, which is facing a critical fuel shortfall due to the war in Iran.

title: Israel Says Iran Is Using Cluster Munitions. What To Know About The Weapons
content: Israel says Iran has been firing cluster munitions throughout their 10-day war — adding a complicated and deadly challenge to Israel's already-stretched air defenses.

title: From Lockheed To Palantir, Defence Stocks Rally Amid Iran-US War
content: With the Iran-US-Israel confrontation completing almost two weeks, the surge in hostilities has rapidly translated into higher defence spending expectations.

title: Airlines Making Arrangements In Response To Middle East Situation: Centre
content: The Civil Aviation Ministry said it is closely monitoring developments in Middle East and their potential implications for air travel between India and the region.

title: Ahead Of Polls, Assam Decides To Rename Fakhruddin Medical College As Barpeta Medical College
content: Assam government on Tuesday announced that the Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed Medical College in Barpeta will be renamed as Barpeta Medical College, a decision taken during the state cabinet meeting chaired by Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma.

title: 48-Year-Old Man Mauled To Death By Leopard In Uttarakhand
content: A man was mauled to death by a leopard in a village here, following which orders were issued to capture the animal, officials said on Tuesday.

title: Around 1,000 Indians Return Safely From Qatar Amid Iran War
content: Amid the developing security situation in West Asia, the Indian Embassy in Qatar said that about 1000 Indian passengers have travelled back to New Delhi, Mumbai and Kochi.

title: Tech, Training: Rajnath Singh Releases Roadmap For Future-Ready Military
content: Defence Minister Rajnath Singh on Tuesday stressed innovation, advanced technologies, and a modern training framework while releasing a vision document on strategic military reforms.

title: Foreign National Run Over By Speeding Audi While Crossing Road In Punjab
content: A tragic late-night road accident in Punjab's Zirakpur claimed the life of a foreign woman after a speeding Audi car allegedly ran her over on VIP Road near M-Care Hospital.

title: "Blatant Violation": Russian Consulate In Iran Damaged In Strikes
content: Russia's consulate in the Iranian city of Isfahan was damaged in shelling earlier this week, Russian Foreign Ministry spokeswoman Maria Zakharova said on Tuesday.

title: Union Cabinet approves international status for Madurai airport
content: The new status is expected to allow more regular international routes and easier approvals for foreign airlines

title: Exoneration in departmental inquiry will not automatically eclipse criminal prosecution in every bribery case: Karnataka High Court
content: In essence, departmental exoneration may influence, but does not automatically extinguish, criminal prosecution.

content: A Bench of Justices J.B. Pardiwala and K.V. Viswanathan is scheduled to deliver the verdict on the case, which was reserved for final decision on February 15 this year, tomorrow (March 11)

title: Tamil Nadu State Planning Commission calls for legal protection and social security for gig workers
content: In a study, ‘Status of Platform Based Gig Workers in Tamil Nadu,’ the Commission highlights the rapid expansion of platform-based work and calls for targeted interventions to ensure welfare, protection, and long-term sustainability for these workers

title: Cabinet nod for 23% hike in cost of link road from Noida airport to Delhi-Mumbai Expressway
content: Revised cost of project is ₹3,630 cr; project to be developed on Hybrid Annuity Mode in Haryana, U.P.; 11 km of 31-km link road will be an elevated highway

title: Don’t carry out any work on ground for now on Sharavathi pumped storage hydroelectric project, Karnataka High Court directs State government
content: A Division Bench comprising Chief Justice Vibhu Bakhru and Justice C.M. Poonacha passed the interim order on the petition filed by Akhilesh Chipli of Shivamogga and two others.

title: Dermatologists warn against rise in unqualified cosmetic procedures
content: Indian Association of Dermatologists, Venereologists and Leprologists Karnataka branch released a QR code that allows members of the public to identify qualified dermatologists in Karnataka.

title: SFC recommends 5% of GST revenue allocation to municipal bodies, including GBA corporations
content: The Fifth State Finance Commission says such a measure will help increase the revenue of municipal bodies by 52%

content: Working president of BRS KTR says half of the Congress government’s tenure lapsed with most of the promises remaining unkept

content: The awards were presented to school teachers for their contributions to teaching of physics, chemistry, and math, thereby building strong foundations for future engineers

title: IISc study has shown no negative impact of treated water supplied to Chickballapur and Kolar: Karnataka Govt.
content: The government announced that it would organise a meeting of legislators from these districts with experts from the IISc.

title: Nurses’ strike continues to affect private hospitals in Kerala

title: Live tracking NFL free agency: Updates on signings, trades, cuts and rumors
content:
Adam Schefter tells Pat McAfee that Romeo Doubs is heading to the Patriots and explains what that now means for A.J. Brown's chances of heading to New England. (1:41) NFL free agency  officially begins at 4 p.m. ET on Wednesday, with the start of the new league year. But as of Monday at noon ET, when the legal negotiation window opened, teams can agree to terms with players. Quarterback  Malik Willis  is signing with the Dolphins and  Tua Tagovailoa  is signing with the Falcons, but which team could be interested in  Kyler Murray ? What's the latest on edge rusher  Trey Hendrickson ? And which big-name players are available as trade candidates? We're tracking all the action of 2026 NFL free agency. Follow along live here with the latest signings, trades, cuts and contract restructures. 2026 NFL free agency coverage: 
 Top 100 rankings  |  Grading big moves 
 Winners, losers  |  Mini mock draft
